parameters.name: dat
parameters.label: Coefficients DAT
parameters.description: The containing the rows and columns of coefficients.

parameters.name: normalize
parameters.label: Normalize Coefficients
parameters.description: This will normalize the coefficients before using them in the convolve. Normaliziation is done by summing all the coefficients and dividing every coefficient by that sum. Note: If the coefficients add

parameters.name: applytoalpha
parameters.label: Apply to Alpha
parameters.description: When off, the alpha channel will not be convolved.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.label: Offset
parameters.description: After the convolution, this value will be added to the R, G and B of the pixel (and A if enabled).

parameters.name: scale
parameters.label: Scale
parameters.description: After the convolution, this value will be multiplied to the sum of the RGB(A) of the pixel and the offset.
